title: Mellow Caramelized Vietnamese Cabbage Pancakes
description: A light, airy Vietnamese pancake with caramelized hispi cabbage, served hot from a tagine pot.
instructions: Thinly slice the cabbage into 2mm strips and set aside.
Whisk together rice flour, water, egg, salt, and pepper in a bowl until smooth; let rest 10 minutes.
Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a tagine pot over medium heat and sauté garlic and ginger until fragrant.
Add the sliced cabbage and brown sugar, stir to coat, and sauté for 5 minutes until the cabbage begins to soften.
Pour the batter over the caramelized cabbage, spreading evenly, and reduce heat to low.
Cover the pot and cook for 8 minutes until the pancake edges are set but the center remains slightly wet.
Remove the lid, flip the pancake gently using a spatula, and cook for another 4 minutes until golden brown.
Squeeze lime juice over the pancake, sprinkle chopped cilantro, and serve immediately.
